title: Functions and methods should only return expected values
description: This rule checks that functions and methods return the expected types based on their signatures.
recommendation: Ensure functions and methods return expected types.

noncompliant.description: Function 'add' expects numerical input but receives a string.

compliant.description: Function 'add' is compliant as it expects and returns integer.

why_is_this_an_issue: Inconsistent return types can lead to runtime errors and make the code harder to understand and maintain.
how_to_fix: Ensure functions and methods have consistent return types based on their signatures.

metadata.title: Functions and methods should only return expected values
